title: HandOver
description: Easier way to give an item
body:
# **HandOver** - easier way to give an item

**HandOver** allows you to transfer an item from your main hand to other players. Just right-click on the player. Ideal plugin for SMP-servers: no-permission, easy to use.



## SHOWCASE:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2eaDJx0_RWE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## Use:
**Player 1:** Select an item to main hand, right-click on the player

**Player 2:** (Accept) Right-click on the player. (Decline) Execute command "/cancel" or just wait for 5 seconds




## Additional:
You can translate plugin messages into your language! Just clone the "en.yml" file in the HandOver folder and change the language in config.yml





## In progress:
- Restricting items for hand over
- Another method to cancel the hand over
- Extended main config
- Multi-lang build-in support ([help me with translating](https://t.me/jammyjohn))
